responsive.desktop: pass: 1440x900 director charts and role surfaces remain stable
responsive.tablet: pass: 768x1024 director, teacher, and parent surfaces remain readable without page-level horizontal overflow
responsive.mobile: pass: 390x844 login, role pages, storybook, AI assistant, and voice entry avoid fixed-element overlap

states.loading: pass: shared loading state covered by state route and business loading flows
states.empty: pass: shared empty state covered without masking demo data
states.error: pass: shared error state and not-found surface covered
states.permission: pass: permission denied states and scoped API envelopes covered
states.providerUnavailable: pass: provider unavailable/fallback states are explicit and redacted

interactions.hover: pass: buttons, cards, tables, chart hotspots, and recommendation surfaces keep hover/tap-safe states
interactions.focus: pass: inputs, nav, dialogs, charts, and controls expose visible focus semantics
interactions.keyboard: pass: Esc close, tab focus, and chart focus tooltip paths covered
interactions.mobileTap: pass: bottom nav, voice entry, storybook controls, feedback input, and sheet actions remain tappable

aiAssistantStates: pass: ready, unavailable/fallback, thinking/streaming, recommended prompts, confirmation, cancel, executed, failed, forbidden scope, unknown intent, and retry paths are covered by product and R08 state tests
chartStates: pass: loading/empty/error visual states, tooltip hover/focus, mobile tick thinning, and no page-level overflow covered
fixedStorybookStates: pass: six fixed pages, images, text placement, audio controls, static audio, unavailable fallback, and scope isolation covered
notes: R08 is ready for R09 pixel-level comparison. Reports intentionally redact provider configuration details. Optional local AI proxy fallback/abort log noise was observed during Playwright shutdown but all assertions passed.
